title: A New Office Trial
article_text: The company started a trial for new office equipment. The administration wanted to reduce stress for workers. They bought a heavy and expensive chair for the executive office. The writer needed to remove extra text from the report. He worked quickly because the context was complex. The radio played music directly in the room. Otherwise, the workers could not concentrate. The manager gave a sample of the new content to the team. He said, "You must conduct the test carefully, or the scene will not be safe." The title of the project was "Better Work, Less Stress."

sentences.zh: 公司开始了一项新办公设备的试用。
